description_long: This object is a single cigarette, featuring a cylindrical shape with a white paper-wrapped body and a tan-brown filter at one end. The filter section is slightly shorter and has a speckled pattern typical of cigarette filters. The opposite end shows a darkened, burnt tip with visible charring and a small amount of ash, indicating it has been lit. The paper body appears smooth and unblemished, with some faint text or markings visible near the filter. No visible brand logo or clear branding is present on the exterior. The cigarette is compact and lightweight, designed to be held between two fingers.
description: A single cigarette with a white paper body, tan filter, and a burnt, ashy tip. The filter is speckled, and faint text is visible near the base.
description_view_0: The cigarette is seen with the burnt, ashy tip facing up and the tan filter at the bottom; faint text is visible near the filter.
description_view_1: This view shows the cigarette's side, highlighting the transition between the white paper and the tan filter, with the burnt tip visible.
description_view_2: The cigarette is shown with the burnt tip more centered, and the filter's speckled pattern is clearly visible.
description_view_3: This angle displays the cigarette's length, with the filter and burnt tip both visible; some faint markings are near the filter.
attribute_burn_mark: The tip of the cigarette is visibly burnt and charred, with dark discoloration and ash.
